original_benchmark.notes: Frontier-CS 2.0 currently contains the Erdos unit distance open-ended optimization problem. The source evaluator reports a bounded score in [0, 100] plus an unbounded score.

harbor_adapter.notes: Initial adapter for the new Frontier-CS 2.0 track, modeled after the official frontier-cs-algorithm Harbor adapter. Parity experiments should be added after the 2.0 track has model runs to compare against.
